requirement_topic.en: Cell, Module, and System Safety — UL 1973, UL 9540 / UL 9540A as FSM BESS Baseline (US-lineage, not IEC-only)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯、模组与系统安全——UL 1973、UL 9540 / UL 9540A作为FSM BESS安全基准（美式体系，非仅IEC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯、模組與系統安全——UL 1973、UL 9540 / UL 9540A作為FSM BESS安全基準（美式體系，非僅IEC）

summary.en: FSM projects are evaluated through state utility procedures and DRD market access context rather than a mature national BESS-specific technical regulation. For stationary BESS, the practical baseline in this US-heritage 60 Hz market is UL 1973 for cells and modules, UL 9540 for complete systems, and UL 9540A fire-propagation testing to support spacing and suppression design. Chinese IEC-only equivalence is not the practical acceptance path in FSM. Exporters should prepare UL-authorised test evidence and project-grade safety files aligned with the target state utility and site conditions.
summary.zh: FSM项目通过州公用事业流程和DRD市场准入背景审查，而不是成熟统一的全国性BESS专门技术法规。在这个美国体系的60 Hz市场，固定式BESS的实际基准是UL 1973（电芯和模组）、UL 9540（完整系统）以及UL 9540A用于间距和抑制设计的火蔓延测试。中国仅IEC路径并非FSM实际验收路径。出口商应准备UL授权测试证据与与目标州公用事业和场景匹配的项目级安全文件。
summary.zht: FSM項目透過州公共事業流程與DRD市場准入背景審查，而非成熟統一的全國性BESS專用技術法規。在此美國體系60 Hz市場中，固定式BESS的實際基準是UL 1973（電芯和模組）、UL 9540（完整系統）以及UL 9540A消防蔓延測試，以支援間距與抑制設計。中國單靠IEC的路徑並非FSM實際驗收路徑。出口商應準備UL授權測試證據及與目標州公共事業和場景匹配的項目級安全文件。

standards_or_laws: UL 1973 — Standard for Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power and Light Electric Rail Applications (cell and module safety baseline for stationary BESS in US-heritage markets)
UL 9540 — Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment (complete BESS system safety certification)
UL 9540A — Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (supporting but not primary in FSM BESS market context)
FSM Department of Resources and Development (DRD) utility coordination and import context

summary.en: China uses GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 as core battery safety baselines for domestic release and Chinese project approvals. These standards are useful for China domestic compliance but do not function as substitute evidence for FSM state utility or DRD-focused acceptance in this 60 Hz market.
summary.zh: 中国以GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作为国内安全基线，用于国内出厂与项目审批。该体系对中国国内合规有用，但在FSM 60 Hz市场下，不构成州公用事业或DRD聚焦受理流程的替代证据。
summary.zht: 中國以GB 44240-2024與GB/T 36276-2023作為國內安全基線，用於國內出廠與項目審批。該體系對中國國內合規有用，但在FSM 60 Hz市場下，不能作為州公共事業或DRD聚焦受理流程的替代證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范

gap.en: Critical gap: FSM practical acceptance is utility- and state-specific and requires UL evidence for this 60 Hz market. Chinese GB certification can remain part of engineering support, but does not replace UL 1973 / UL 9540 / UL 9540A pathways. Exporters should obtain state utility acceptance and project-owner confirmation for each unit variant before procurement release and commissioning.
gap.zh: 关键差距：FSM实际验收是以州级和项目为单位、以实操为中心，并要求该60 Hz市场下的UL证据。中国GB体系证书可作为工程支持材料，但不能替代UL 1973、UL 9540、UL 9540A路径。出口商应在采购放行与调试前，按每个型号变体获得州公用事业和项目业主确认。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：FSM實際驗收是以州級與項目為單位、以實務為中心，並要求該60 Hz市場下的UL證據。中國GB體系證書可作為工程支持材料，但不能取代UL 1973、UL 9540、UL 9540A路徑。出口商應在採購放行與調試前，按每個型號變體獲得州公共事業和項目業主確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for practical project acceptance where state utilities, DRD filing, and project owners expect UL 1973 / UL 9540 / UL 9540A evidence
mandatory_status.cn: China mandatory domestic standards do not guarantee FSM utility acceptance

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In FSM projects, treat Chinese GB safety documentation as domestic engineering context only. Confirm UL 1973 and UL 9540 evidence with the receiving state utility and DRD, and include UL 9540A fire-propagation outputs for site acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在FSM项目中，将中国GB安全文件仅视为中国国内工程背景。应与目的州公用事业与DRD确认UL 1973与UL 9540证据，并提供UL 9540A火蔓延输出供现场验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在FSM項目中，將中國GB安全文件僅視為中國國內工程背景。應與目標州公共事業與DRD確認UL 1973與UL 9540證據，並提供UL 9540A火蔓延輸出作為場址驗收資料。
